/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nongmol-jni.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libnongmol-jni.so -o libnongmol-jni.so "CMakeFiles/nongmol-jni.dir/native-lib.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/NongMolAgentOS/app/src/main/cpp/../jniLibs/arm64-v8a /data/data/com.termux/files/home/NongMolAgentOS/app/src/main/cpp/../jniLibs/arm64-v8a/libllama.so -llog
